code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
        val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
      else if c == 45 and not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        val = 0
      else
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, sign * val)
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let tlist = parse_ints(line2)
let t = match tlist.get(0)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

mut filtered: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  if x > t
    filtered = list.push(filtered, x)
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in filtered
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
